iotanalytics.datastore.fileformatconfigu:
Contains the configuration information of file formats. AWS IoT Analytics data stores support JSON and [Parquet](https://parquet.apache.org/).

The default file format is JSON. You can specify only one format.

You can't change the file format after you create the data store.

iotanalytics.datastore.fileformatconfigu.Description: Contains the configuration information of the JSON format.
Contains the configuration information of the Parquet format.
